The [[Atmosphere|atmospheric]] '''stormtrooper transport''' was an open-top [[Repulsorlift|repulsor]] craft used by the [[Galactic Empire]] to move [[stormtrooper]]s at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War]]. Such vehicles were notably used at the temporary Imperial [[Mos Eisley prefecture militia base|garrison base]] of [[Mos Eisley]], [[Tatooine]], during the search for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[droid]]s [[R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO]].<ref name="CL 2016" />

The [[transport]]'s design bore resemblence to the [[Platoon Attack Craft]] used around two [[Standard decade|decades]] earlier by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars]].<ref name="CL 2016" />

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Stormtrooper_transport-ANH.png|thumb|right|220px|A stormtrooper transport flying over Mos Eisley]]
The stormtrooper transport first appeared in the [[1997]] Special Edition re-release of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], in which it can be seen flying in the atmosphere of Tatooine at a distance.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref> It was first identified in the [[2016]] reference book [[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']].<ref name="CL 2016" />
